mano_cua.result_summary: 示例应用的井字棋默认以activePlayers:null(Stage.NULL)运行，但无UI入口调用setActivePlayers/setStage API设置Stage.NULL状态。debug panel PLAYERS区域不显示stage标签。无法通过可视化操作验证setStage(Stage.NULL)的行为
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Tic-Tac-Toe example app operates with activePlayers:null by default (Stage.NULL), but the specific bug is about programmatic setStage/setActivePlayers for Stage.NULL. The example app doesn't expose UI to invoke these APIs. The Turn Orders Simulator shows ActivePlayers.ALL configuration but not Stage.NULL specifics. Cannot visually verify the setStage(Stage.NULL) behavior through the UI.
